title: Security: Heap-use-after-free in ash::OverviewItem::DestroyPhantomsForDragging
description_snippet:
**VERSION**   
Chrome Version: linux-release-chromeos_asan-linux-release-1008401.zip  
Operating System: Linux   
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
  
Run with --force-tablet-mode=touch_view  
   
1. Get a page in full screen  
2. Press F5 and drag the page to the right or left to use slip screen  
  
==3
